description:
Automated translation (refer to source for accuracy)

Stormwater drainage improvement work in the Sengen area will close Municipal Road 1-15-2. Kokusai Kogyo bus routes will be changed accordingly.

【Work Overview】
Work period: March 30, 2026 (Reiwa 8) to June 30, 2026 (Reiwa 8) (planned)
Work location: Aiou, Tawayanagi, Hanno City
Work hours: 9:00 AM to 5:00 PM

【Bus Route Changes】
Detour period: March 30, 2026 to June 30, 2026 (planned)
Affects: Buses arriving at or departing from Sengen bus stop Monday through Saturday (excluding national holidays during the work period) between 9:00 AM and 5:00 PM

If you plan to use Sengen bus stop, please use Kojoumae (Factory Front) bus stop or Shiei Jutaku (Municipal Housing) bus stop instead. Detailed bus route information will be posted at Sengen bus stop.

Source (Japanese): https://www.city.hanno.lg.jp/soshikikarasagasu/tosikensetubu/tosiseibika/13270.html
summary: ℹ️ Road closure and bus route changes due to stormwater drainage work in Sengen area
